prompts:
A tiny chibi character stands on an ancient stone kitchen counter, staring wide-eyed at a single gleaming tablespoon of golden olive oil held dramatically in both hands, illuminated from above as if by a spotlight. The character has oversized expressive eyes and compact proportions. Setting: a rustic Mediterranean kitchen at dawn, warm amber light slanting through a small arched window, terracotta pots in the background. Key visual detail: a single golden drop suspended mid-fall from the spoon, catching the light like a gemstone.

Style: Traditional hand-drawn European comic illustration. Chibi character proportions with large expressive heads. Muted desaturated color palette: warm amber, earthy terracotta, deep olive green. Cross-hatching and stippling shading. Old parchment paper texture overlay. Soft warm amber glow on the olive oil drop. Detailed foreground, softer background. Decorative panel border frame. Vertical 9:16 format, safe zone padding top 15% and bottom 25%. No text, no speech bubbles, no typography, no UI elements.

A chibi scientist character in a small white lab coat peers through a magnifying glass at a glowing olive branch, surrounded by floating molecular structures and tiny hexagonal polyphenol shapes emitting a soft golden light. Setting: a cozy stone-walled research cellar in Southern Italy, shelves lined with antique olive oil bottles, warm candlelight. Key visual detail: one glowing polyphenol molecule larger than the rest, center frame, radiating soft concentric rings of energy.

Style: Traditional hand-drawn European comic illustration. Chibi character proportions with large expressive heads. Muted desaturated color palette: warm gold, slate grey, forest green. Cross-hatching and stippling shading. Old parchment paper texture overlay. Soft warm amber glow on the central molecule. Detailed foreground, softer background. Decorative panel border frame. Vertical 9:16 format, safe zone padding top 15% and bottom 25%. No text, no speech bubbles, no typography, no UI elements.

A chibi character slumped over a tiny desk, head resting on arms, surrounded by small storm clouds hovering just above its head, while a tiny flame inside a transparent chest cavity flickers weakly. Setting: a grey, dimly lit apartment at 7am, alarm clock visible in the background, a half-eaten sugary snack on the desk. Key visual detail: the mitochondria inside the character's body shown as tiny exhausted furnaces with dying embers.

Style: Traditional hand-drawn European comic illustration. Chibi character proportions with large expressive heads. Muted desaturated color palette: cool slate grey, muted blue, dusty rose. Cross-hatching and stippling shading. Old parchment paper texture overlay. No warm glow — deliberately cold and dim lighting. Detailed foreground, softer background. Decorative panel border frame. Vertical 9:16 format, safe zone padding top 15% and bottom 25%. No text, no speech bubbles, no typography, no UI elements.

The same chibi character now stands tall and energized, tiny mitochondria inside its transparent chest blazing like bright furnaces, while small golden shields float around its body deflecting dark red arrows labeled as inflammation. Setting: a sun-drenched Mediterranean hillside village at golden hour, ancient olive trees in the background, a centenarian elder chibi watching approvingly from a doorway. Key visual detail: a visible blood-sugar wave line in the foreground flattened and calm, like a still sea.

Style: Traditional hand-drawn European comic illustration. Chibi character proportions with large expressive heads. Muted desaturated color palette: warm gold, forest green, earthy brown. Cross-hatching and stippling shading. Old parchment paper texture overlay. Soft warm amber glow on the mitochondria furnaces inside the character. Detailed foreground, softer background. Decorative panel border frame. Vertical 9:16 format, safe zone padding top 15% and bottom 25%. No text, no speech bubbles, no typography, no UI elements.

A chibi character stands at a rustic wooden table in early morning light, confidently pouring one tablespoon of deep golden olive oil into a small ceramic bowl, next to a halved lemon. The character's expression is focused and purposeful, like performing a sacred morning ritual. Setting: a bright Mediterranean kitchen at sunrise, olive branch on the windowsill, stone floor, warm golden light. Key visual detail: visible polyphenol sparkles rising gently from the oil like tiny golden stars.

Style: Traditional hand-drawn European comic illustration. Chibi character proportions with large expressive heads. Muted desaturated color palette: warm amber, cream white, olive green. Cross-hatching and stippling shading. Old parchment paper texture overlay. Soft warm amber glow on the olive oil in the spoon. Detailed foreground, softer background. Decorative panel border frame. Vertical 9:16 format, safe zone padding top 15% and bottom 25%. No text, no speech bubbles, no typography, no UI elements.

A cheerful chibi character faces the viewer directly, arms slightly open in a warm welcoming gesture, standing in front of a giant decorative olive branch wreath forming a circular frame. Small crowd of tiny chibi figures visible below, looking up enthusiastically. Setting: a warm amphitheater-like Mediterranean plaza at dusk, golden lanterns glowing in the background. Key visual detail: the character holds a tiny glowing olive oil bottle like a trophy, light radiating from it.
